Interface List<E>

All Known Implementing Classes:
DoublyLinkedList
public interface List<E>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(int i, E element)
    Add an element to the list at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
    void
    add(E element)
    Add an element to the end of the list
    E
    get(int i)
    Gets the element at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns true if the list is empty and false if there are elements
    E
    remove()
    Removes the last element from the list
    E
    remove(int i)
    Remove element at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
    void
    set(int i, E element)
    Sets the element at i to a new value If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
    int
    size()
    Returns the size of the list
    String
    toString()
    Prints out the list in the format [value1, value2, value3, …]

  • Method Details

    • add

      void add(E element)
      Add an element to the end of the list
      Parameters:
      element - element to add to the list

    • add

      void add(int i, E element) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Add an element to the list at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Parameters:
      i - index of the element
      element - element to add to the list
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • remove

      E remove()
      Removes the last element from the list

    • remove

      E remove(int i) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Remove element at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Parameters:
      i - index of the element to remove
      Returns:
      the element that was removed
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • get

      E get(int i) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Gets the element at index i If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Parameters:
      i - index of the element
      Returns:
      the element
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • set

      void set(int i, E element) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Sets the element at i to a new value If index is invalid, throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
      Parameters:
      i - index of the element to set
      element - new value of the element
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the size of the list
      Returns:
      the size of the list

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if the list is empty and false if there are elements
      Returns:

    • toString

      String toString()
      Prints out the list in the format [value1, value2, value3, …]
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a String of the list
